text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, about tomorrow's training. I'd<n>like to do
something to clear my mind.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: So, could you bring some clay tiles<n>tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I thought long and hard about the best<n>way to do
it, and I settled on smashing<n>some tiles with my
bare fists, followed<n>by a refreshing run.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Good idea, right?! I'd even call it great!Starting tomorrow, I'm gonna smashthrough that new routine!
